ai_reasoning: A malicious typosquatted package was installed across 4 CI runners, establishing reverse shells and exfiltrating AWS and GitHub credentials. The blast radius is wide — any pipeline that ran in the last 47 minutes may be affected. CI/CD compromise gives the attacker potential production deployment capability. This is a critical-severity incident requiring immediate IR activation.
ai_suggested_actions: Immediately rotate all exposed secrets: AWS keys and GitHub tokens from all 4 runners
Isolate all 4 affected CI runners and remove requests-plus from the internal mirror
Audit all deployments triggered in the last 47 minutes for signs of tampering
scenario_title: Supply Chain Attack - Malicious Package in Internal PyPI Mirror
